## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Related issues

Link issue(s):

## Change type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor

- [ ] Tests

## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused and limited.
- [ ] Plan contract and prompt contract changes are intentional (if touched).
- [ ] Tests/docs updated where needed.
